DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: Laurel Halbany, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltfs & opposing parties; Christine Hawkins, Esq. of Filice Brown Eassa & McLeod LLP 510/444-3131 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - sustained without leave to amend as to the adult plaintiffs. It is sustained with 30 days leave to amend to Joshua Uiagalelei to obtain the appointment of a guardian ad litem. Order signed in open court (one order signed for both defendant Ford Motor Company and defendant General Motors Corporation's demurrers). (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
